LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GLEN SANTOS, ERNEST BALDRY, WESLEY WARE, GEORGE BARAN MOTION TO BIFURCATE EQUITABLE ISSUES FOR TRIAL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWING THE MOTION TO BE DECIDED BY THE TRIAL JUDGE. WHILE THIS MOTION MAY BE DECIDED BY A JUDGE WHO IS NOT THE TRIAL JUDGE, THAT IS NOT GOOD JUDICIAL POLICY. THE TRIAL JUDGE, NOT A LAW AND MOTION JUDGE, IS IN THE BEST POSITION TO DETERMINE IF THE CLAIMS OR ISSUES SHOULD BE BIFURCATED OR SEVERED IN ANY WAY AND, IF SO, HOW. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE as to Samantha M. Rollins is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO BIFURCATE/SEVER / Notice Of Motion To Bifurcate Equitable Issues For Trial
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GLEN SANTOS, ERNEST BALDRY, WESLEY WARE, GEORGE BARAN Motion To Bifurcate Equitable Issues For Trial is DENIED without prejudice to renewing the motion to be decided by the trial judge. While this motion may be decided by a judge who is not the trial judge, that is not good judicial policy. The trial judge, not a law and motion judge, is in the best position to determine if the claims or issues should be bifurcated or severed in any way and, if so, how. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
